name: Pucara Gold Ltd.
summary: Pucara Gold Ltd., a junior exploration company, focuses on the discovery and advancement of precious metals deposits in Peru. The company explores for gold, copper, zinc, lead, and silver deposits. Its flagship project is the Lourdes gold project covering an area of 2,576 hectares located in Ayacucho, Peru. Pucara Gold Ltd. is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
